General.Name: FRIWO AG
General.Description: FRIWO AG, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells smart power supplies units and drive solutions in Germany, rest of Europe, Asia, and internationally. The company offers intelligent components and systems for electric drives; plug-in, desktop, open frame, flush-mounted, and USB power supplies; Li-Ion chargers, interchangeable AC plug systems, desktop chargers, and inductive charging products; and battery packs and battery management systems, as well as customized solutions. It also provides displays, vehicle and motor control units, drive units, batteries, software, and back-to-back test benches; and end-to-end contract manufacturing services for electronic assemblies and equipment. The company serves the specialized tools and equipment; industrial applications; medical and healthcare solutions; e-mobility, transportation, and logistics; and lifestyle solutions sectors. It sells its products through its online store. The company was formerly known as CEAG AG and changed its name to FRIWO AG in 2009. FRIWO AG was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Ostbevern, Germany.
